creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
I do not care about 12-CURRENT and its hicc-ups. 
Debug it for me and I'll have a look if any bits need to be taken upstream, but better look at openvpn-devel on -CURRENT for a while because openvpn-devel is on its way to release 2.4.0 and that should be good to go on -CURRENT.
